papers.title_en: AI-Generated Image Recognition via Fusion of CNNs and Vision Transformers
papers.authors: Xuan-Bach Mai, Hoang-Minh Nguyen-Huu, Quoc-Nghia Nguyen, Hoang-Tung Vu, Minh-Triet Tran, Trung-Nghia Le
papers.evidence: 融合CNN和Vision Transformer的特征用于图像识别
papers.tldr: 合成数据技术使AI生成图像高度逼真，威胁数据真实性。本文提出融合CNN和Vision Transformer的检测方法，通过集成多检测策略增强识别能力。在CIFAKE数据集上达到97.32%准确率，有效区分AI与真实图像。该工作为应对合成数据泛滥提供了可靠的数据鉴别方案。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advancements in synthetic data technology have opened a new era where images of remarkable quality are generated, blurring the lines between real-life images and those produced by Artificial Intelligence (AI). This evolution poses a significant challenge to ensuring the reliability and authenticity of data, underscoring the need for robust detection methods. In this paper, we present a robust approach aimed at addressing these pressing concerns. Our methodology revolves around leveraging fusion strategies, combining the strengths of multiple detection methods for identifying AI-generated images. Through extensive experimentation on the CIFAKE dataset, our model showcases remarkable performance, achieving an impressive accuracy rate of 97.32%. This accomplishment underscores the efficacy of our approach in accurately distinguishing between AI-generated images and real-life images, thus contributing to the advancement of data authentication techniques amidst the proliferation of synthetic data.
